diagrams.title: PRNG State Machine Architecture
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing how seed, entropy source, state, and output interact in a cryptographic PRNG
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate the components required for forward/backward security in PRNGs

diagrams.title: LCG Algorithm Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step computation of Linear Congruential Generator showing recurrence relation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why LCG is predictable - the linear structure can be exploited

diagrams.title: Blum Blum Shub Operation
diagrams.description: BBS generator showing quadratic residue computation modulo composite n = p·q
elements: Output: LSB of X² mod n
diagrams.purpose: Show the trapdoor nature - easy to compute with n, hard without knowing p and q
